relationships.description: NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 1 (Legal/Regulatory) maps to ISO 42001 A.2 (AI Policies) for AI regulatory compliance alignment.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 1 maps to ISO 42001 Clause 4.2 (Needs of interested parties) for understanding regulatory stakeholder requirements.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 1 maps to EU AI Act Governance and Enforcement framework.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 2 (Accountability) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 5.3 (Roles, responsibilities, authorities).
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 2 maps to ISO 42001 A.3 (Internal Organization) for AI accountability structures.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 3 (Workforce) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 7.2 (Competence) for AI expertise and diversity.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 4 (Risk Tolerances) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 6.1 (Actions to address risks) for defining AI risk appetite.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 5 (Third-Party) maps to ISO 42001 A.10 (Third-party and Customer Relationships).
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 5 maps to EU AI Act GPAI model provisions for third-party AI risk management.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 6 (Policies) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 5.2 (AI Policy).
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 1 (Intended Purpose) maps to ISO 42001 A.9 (Use of AI Systems) for defining intended use and misuse prevention.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 1 maps to EU AI Act High-Risk classification for determining AI system risk level by intended purpose.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 2 (Interdisciplinary Actors) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 7.1 (Resources) for diverse stakeholder participation.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 3 (Benefits and Costs) maps to ISO 42001 A.5 (Assessing Impacts) for evaluating AI system value and risk.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 4 (Risks and Impacts) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 8.2 (AI Risk Assessment).
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 4 maps to EU AI Act Article 9 (Risk Management System) for high-risk AI systems.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 5 (Likelihood) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 8.4 (AI System Impact Assessment).
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MEASURE 1 (Metrics) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 9.1 (Monitoring, measurement, analysis).
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MEASURE 2 (Trustworthiness) maps to EU AI Act Article 15 (Accuracy, Robustness, Cybersecurity).
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MEASURE 2 maps to EU AI Act Article 13 (Transparency) for assessing AI system transparency.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MEASURE 2 maps to ISO 42001 A.6 (AI System Lifecycle) for trustworthiness testing across the lifecycle.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MEASURE 2 maps to ISO 42001 A.7 (Data for AI Systems) for data quality and bias testing.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MEASURE 3 (Tracking) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 9.1 for ongoing monitoring of AI risks.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MEASURE 4 (Feedback) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 10.1 (Continual improvement) for measurement refinement.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MANAGE 1 (Prioritization) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 8.3 (AI Risk Treatment).
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MANAGE 2 (Treatment) maps to EU AI Act Article 72 (Post-Market Monitoring) for ongoing risk management.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MANAGE 2 maps to EU AI Act Article 26 (Deployer Obligations) for deployer risk treatment responsibilities.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MANAGE 3 (Response) maps to EU AI Act Article 73 (Serious Incident Reporting) for AI incident response.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MANAGE 3 maps to ISO 42001 Clause 10.2 (Nonconformity and corrective action) for AI incident recovery.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MANAGE 4 (Residual Risk) maps to ISO 42001 Clause 7.4 (Communication) for residual risk communication to stakeholders.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MANAGE 4 maps to ISO 42001 A.8 (Information for Interested Parties) for transparency about residual AI risks.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 1 maps to EU AI Act Article 13 (Transparency) for documenting AI system purpose and limitations.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: GOVERN 4 maps to EU AI Act Article 27 (Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment) for organizational risk tolerance alignment.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MEASURE 2 maps to GDPR DPIA for privacy testing of AI systems processing personal data.
NIST AI RMF Crosswalk: MAP 4 maps to ISO 23894 AI Risk Assessment for risk identification methodology alignment.
NIST AI RMF Govern function maps to NIST CSF Govern function. Both address organizational governance of risk management.
NIST AI RMF Govern function maps to ISO 31000 Leadership and commitment for AI risk governance.
NIST AI RMF Map function maps to ISO 31000 Scope, context and criteria. Both establish context for risk identification.
NIST AI RMF Map function maps to NIST CSF Identify function. Both focus on understanding risks in context.
NIST AI RMF Measure function maps to ISO 31000 Risk Assessment. Both involve assessing and analyzing identified risks.
NIST AI RMF Measure function relates to NIST CSF Detect. Measuring AI risks includes detecting adverse events and anomalies.
NIST AI RMF Manage function maps to ISO 31000 Risk Treatment. Both prioritize and act on identified risks.
NIST AI RMF Manage function maps to NIST CSF Respond. Both include incident response and recovery planning.
NIST AI RMF Secure and Resilient characteristic maps to NIST CSF Protect function.
NIST AI RMF Privacy-Enhanced characteristic relates to GDPR data protection principles.
NIST AI RMF Fairness characteristic relates to EU AI Act prohibited practices. Both address harmful bias and discrimination.
NIST AI RMF Govern function maps to EU AI Act risk management system requirement. Both establish AI risk governance.
NIST AI RMF Explainability characteristic maps to EU AI Act transparency requirement for high-risk AI.
NIST AI RMF legal and regulatory compliance relates to EU AI Act governance and enforcement framework.
NIST AI RMF Third-Party Risk Management relates to NIST SP 800-53 Supply Chain Risk Management family.
NIST AI RMF Map function relates to NIST RMF Categorize step. Both involve understanding system context and classifying risk.
NIST AI RMF Manage function relates to NIST RMF Monitor step. Both involve ongoing risk response and tracking.
NIST AI RMF Secure and Resilient characteristic relates to ISO 27000 Technological controls for AI system security.
NIST AI RMF Third-Party Risk Management relates to ISO 27000 Organizational controls for AI supply chain security.
